name: Buffalo Transportation Inc
officers: Igor Yuzbashev (Vice-President; also reported as Gary Yusbashev/Owner per BBB)
registry_source: NYS Dept of State, Division of Corporations (DOS); BBB profile 0041-122235706
notes: FMCSA SAFER name search returned no carrier matching Buffalo, NY 14216. Two same-name SAFER records exist (USDOT 3617833 in La Puente CA; USDOT 4305298 in Elk Grove Village IL) - both are unrelated single-truck carriers, not this Buffalo NY company. Buffalo Transportation Inc at 289 Ramsdell appears to be an intrastate non-emergency medical transport / taxi / ambulette operator regulated by NYSDOT Bus Safety (NY DOT Operator ID 36426, 60 inspections SFY2021-22) rather than FMCSA. DOJ press release 2024 confirms company existed and resolved EIDL False Claims allegations. Fleet size for medical taxi/ambulette operations not publicly disclosed.

name: Medicab Of Rochester
registry_source: NYS Dept of State (DOS); company About Us page; BBB profile 0041-22001921
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found matching Medicab of Rochester at 1449 Hudson Ave, Rochester NY. The SAFER 'MEDICAB INC' record (USDOT 2268937) is a different Georgia entity in Mount Vernon GA. Medicab of Rochester operates intrastate as a non-emergency medical transport / wheelchair van operator, regulated by NYSDOT Bus Safety (NY DOT Operator ID 03006; 64 inspections SFY 2021-22) - exempt from interstate FMCSA registration. Originally a franchise of MediCab Inc. (Boston), incorporated independently in 1978 after dissolving franchise relationship. Fleet grew from 4 vehicles (1978) to 26 (late 1980s) to ~50 vehicles by 2014 per company About Us page.

name: Palmer Bus Svc
inc_date: 1974 (parent Palmer Bus Service founded; Austin entity is a subsidiary)
registry_source: MN Secretary of State (Business Filings); Palmer Bus Service company website
notes: FMCSA SAFER USDOT 351030 matches PALMER BUS SERVICE OF AUSTIN INC at 2001 4th St NW Austin MN 55912 (mailing PO Box 2026 Mankato MN 56002). Note: the input address (1204 23rd Ave SW, Austin MN 55912) differs from the FMCSA physical address. Parent company Palmer Bus Service, Inc. founded 1974 in St. Clair MN by Floyd & Lois Palmer; Austin operation has served the community 'since 2010' per Austin Chamber of Commerce. MCS-150 form date 12/16/2021 may be stale. Intrastate-only operation. The parent entity Palmer Bus Service Inc (USDOT 1764420) is separate.

name: Dean Transportation
inc_date: 1991 (renamed Dean Transportation Inc; predecessor Special Transportation 1969; original Christianson-founded co. early 1950s)
registry_source: Michigan LARA / MiBusiness Registry; Dean Transportation company history page (deandifference.com)
notes: FMCSA SAFER USDOT 1538328 matches DEAN TRANSPORTATION INC, DBA Dean Transportation, headquarters at 4812 Aurelius Rd Lansing MI 48910. The input address (4155 Trade Dr SE Grand Rapids MI 49508) is a Grand Rapids satellite/operating bus center for GRPS contract, not the FMCSA-registered HQ. Power Units 87 reflects MCS-150 as of 08/30/2024 but is significantly under-reported relative to operations - Dean transports 4,800+ GRPS scholars daily plus statewide special-ed routes. Operation is private passenger (non-business / school bus contractor). Company founded as Christianson-led service in early 1950s, renamed Special Transportation 1969, became Dean Transportation Inc 1991 when Kellie Dean took ownership.

name: Rohrer Bus Svc
inc_date: early 1920s (founded by Howard E. Rohrer Sr.; current LLC entity H E Rohrer LLC formation date not retrievable from PA DOS)
officers: Family-run, four generations of Rohrer family ownership
registry_source: PA Department of State (Business Entity Search at file.dos.pa.gov - search unavailable via WebFetch); Rohrer Bus official history page
notes: FMCSA SAFER USDOT 10686 confirms H E ROHRER LLC, DBA ROHRER BUS SERVICE, at 1515 State Road Duncannon PA 17020. Input address (4 Forge Rd, Boiling Springs PA 17007) is one of Rohrer's 27 satellite operating locations, not the corporate HQ. Power units 1,058 / drivers 682 are current as of MCS-150 dated 11/07/2025. Satisfactory safety rating dated 10/30/2013. Operation classifications include Authorized For Hire, Exempt For Hire, Private (Property), and School Bus. PA PUC authority A-97618. Serves 15+ school districts and Hersheypark shuttles across PA, MD, NJ, DE, VA, WV. Founded early 1920s; transitioned from horse-and-wagon to motorized fleet; reached 70 buses by 1975 under Howard Rohrer Jr; new HQ built 1976. PA DOS entity number not publicly searchable via WebFetch (file.dos.pa.gov returns 403).
